name: open-state-camping
description: Find and book Parks Canada campsites in plain language, accessibly — from your own machine.
long_description: An independent, public-interest assistive tool. It searches Parks Canada campsite availability in plain language, puts accessibility first, and runs entirely on your own device so your searches come from your own connection. It is not operated by or endorsed by Parks Canada. It never stores your government login and never books on its own — you confirm everything yourself.

tools.name: search_parks
tools.description: Find Parks Canada campgrounds by a plain-language place name.

tools.name: list_equipment_types
tools.description: List equipment types you can filter sites by (tent, RV, ...).

tools.name: search_sites
tools.description: Find open campsites in a campground for a stay, accessibility first.

tools.name: search_park_availability
tools.description: Check every campground in a park at once and say which have openings.

tools.name: get_site_details
tools.description: Plain-language detail about one campsite, including accessibility and photos.

tools.name: prepare_booking_url
tools.description: Prepare a Parks Canada booking link you open and confirm yourself.

tools.name: connect_account
tools.description: Log in / sign in / connect your Parks Canada account: opens your own Chrome so you sign in yourself; session saved encrypted on this device.

tools.name: connection_status
tools.description: Check whether your Parks Canada account is connected and the session is still valid.

tools.name: disconnect_account
tools.description: Remove the saved Parks Canada session from this device.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Show your Parks Canada profile (name, email, phone, address) from your connected session.

tools.name: list_my_reservations
tools.description: List your current and upcoming Parks Canada reservations from your connected session.

tools.name: update_account
tools.description: Update your Parks Canada profile (phone, address, name, language) after you confirm the change.

tools.name: prepare_booking
tools.description: Prepare a campsite reservation to the payment screen; you review and pay in your own browser. Nothing is held or charged until you confirm and pay.

tools.name: debug_account_shape
tools.description: Diagnostic: profile data shape (personal values masked).
